_comment: Board MANIFEST for the First-Blood track: the challenge instances (file + bits) in display order, plus repo/branch for writeup links. Solves are NOT recorded here. A contestant submits submissions/<dir>/solution.json with the recovered k; CI verifies k·G == Q and site/build.py promotes that instance to SOLVED on the board automatically. To post a NEW challenge, add its instance_public_<bits>.json and an entry here. See first_blood/README.md -> 'Submitting a solve'.
